event TaskDeployed(address indexed taskAddress, address indexed coordinator, address token, uint256 reward, uint256 deadline)

function deployTask(tuple(address verifier, address token, uint256 stakeRequired, uint256 deadline, uint256 disputeWindow, bytes32 criteriaHash, string criteriaURI, bool humanGateEnabled) params) external payable returns (address taskAddress)
function tasksByCoordinator(address coordinator) external view returns (address[])
